title: Review: refactor(jmap-chat): idiomatic API fixes wave C
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — Patch footgun requires misuse; enum drift is caught by tests when spec sends new known variants.
Confidence: 92% chance no missed bugs. Uncertainty: Patch<T> footgun (Keep→null if skip_serializing_if omitted) not exercised by current tests since all existing Patch fields use correct attrs. Would raise confidence if: compile-time check (debug_assert) or type-level enforcement (separate type for 'Patch that must be skipped') were added.
